name: Devika Santhosh
title: Data Analyst
tagline: I build SQL pipelines, automate reporting, and turn messy data into decisions.
about: Analytics-focused data professional with 1.7 years of experience building SQL-driven data workflows, automating reporting pipelines, and developing BI dashboards. Holds an MSc in Mathematics from IISER Thiruvananthapuram.

Currently at Synaptic, working with private-market investment data across 30K+ companies — building SQL pipelines, automating Excel reporting with VBA, and creating interactive dashboards in Power BI and Metabase.
Passionate about building scalable data systems and actively upskilling toward analytics engineering with dbt and modern data stack tools.
